name: Green Tomato Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Layer sliced green tomatoes and onions alternately in a large, clean crock.
2. Sprinkle a layer of pickling salt between each layer of vegetables.
3. Place the lid on the crock and let it sit overnight at room temperature.
4. The next day, carefully drain any liquid that has accumulated under the lid.
5. In a kettle, bring 1 cup vinegar and 1 cup water to a boil.
6. Remove from heat and add cheesecloth containing pickling spice.
7. Pour the hot mixture into the vegetables in the crock, followed by brown sugar and remaining vinegar.
8. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
9. Allow mixture to cool before transferring to sterilized jars.
10. Seal the jars tightly and store at room temperature.
Note: Do not leave heat on or unattended during cooking process.
